nasb.text: She said to him, “My lord, you swore to your maidservant by the Lord your God, saying, ‘Surely your son Solomon shall be king after me and he shall sit on my throne.’

esv.text: She said to him, “My lord, you swore to your servant by the Lord your God, saying, ‘Solomon your son shall reign after me, and he shall sit on my throne.’

cnv.text: 她回答說：“我主啊，你曾經指著耶和華你的　神向婢女起誓，說：‘你的兒子所羅門必接續我作王，他要坐在我的王位上’，

ccb.text: 拔示芭回答说：“我主啊，你曾经凭你的上帝耶和华起誓说让臣妾的儿子所罗门继承你的王位，坐你的宝座。
